title: 2026 Golden Globe Awards: Full List of Winners
text: 2026 Golden Globes Winners Analysis. Major Film Winners: Best Motion Picture Drama: Hamnet (directed by Chloé Zhao). Best Motion Picture Musical or Comedy: One Battle After Another (directed by Paul Thomas Anderson). Paul Thomas Anderson's film dominated with four wins total, including Best Director and Best Screenplay. Key Performances: Drama Acting: Wagner Moura (The Secret Agent) and Jessie Buckley (Hamnet) won lead acting categories. Comedy/Musical: Timothée Chalamet (Marty Supreme) and Rose Byrne (If I Had Legs I'd Kick You) claimed top performance honors. Television Highlights: Adolescence nabbed four Golden Globes, while The Pitt won Best TV Drama Series and The Studio claimed Best TV Comedy Series. Supporting & Technical Wins: Non-English Film: The Secret Agent. Animated Feature: KPop Demon Hunters. Original Score: Ludwig Göransson (Sinners). Box Office Achievement: Sinners. Ryan Coogler's Sinners emerged as a significant commercial and critical success across multiple categories.
